name: MetLife Stadium
description: MetLife Stadium is the centrepiece of the 2026 World Cup, hosting the Final itself. Situated in the New York/New Jersey metropolitan area — the world's media capital — the venue is one of the largest in the United States and guarantees an unrivalled atmosphere for the tournament's biggest moments.

name: SoFi Stadium
description: One of the most technologically advanced stadiums ever built, SoFi Stadium in Inglewood hosts World Cup 2026 matches in the Los Angeles area. Its striking translucent roof and state-of-the-art videoboard create a spectacular setting for international football.

name: AT&T Stadium
description: Known as 'Jerry World', AT&T Stadium in Arlington, Texas, is an iconic American sports venue. Its retractable roof, massive interior video board, and 80,000-seat capacity make it one of the premier World Cup 2026 venues, drawing fans from across the Lone Star State.
